title: Virtualization Windows
text:
features:
          acpi: {}
          apic: {}
          hyperv:
            relaxed: {}
            spinlocks:
              spinlocks: 8191
            vapic: {}
          smm: {}
        firmware:
          bootloader:
            efi:
              secureBoot: true
          uuid: 5d307ca9-b3ef-428c-8861-06e72d69f223
      networks:
      - name: default
        pod: {}
      volumes:
      - name: cdromiso
        dataVolume:
          name: windev
      - name: harddrive
        persistentVolumeClaim:
          claimName: winhd
      - name: virtiocontainerdisk
        containerDisk:
          image: kubevirt/virtio-container-disk
```
